targets.rawSql: SELECT event_date AS time, max(dau) AS dau FROM cinema.agg_dau GROUP BY event_date ORDER BY event_date
SELECT event_date AS time, max(conversion_rate) * 100 AS conversion_pct FROM cinema.agg_conversion GROUP BY event_date ORDER BY event_date
SELECT movie_id, sum(view_count) AS total_views FROM cinema.agg_top_movies WHERE event_date >= today() - 7 GROUP BY movie_id ORDER BY total_views DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT event_date AS time, max(avg_seconds) AS avg_watch_seconds FROM cinema.agg_avg_watch_time GROUP BY event_date ORDER BY event_date

SELECT cohort_date, groupArray(retention_pct)[1] AS d0, groupArray(retention_pct)[2] AS d1, groupArray(retention_pct)[3] AS d2, groupArray(retention_pct)[4] AS d3, groupArray(retention_pct)[5] AS d4, groupArray(retention_pct)[6] AS d5, groupArray(retention_pct)[7] AS d6, groupArray(retention_pct)[8] AS d7 FROM ( SELECT cohort_date, day_number, max(retention_pct) AS retention_pct FROM cinema.agg_retention GROUP BY cohort_date, day_number ORDER BY cohort_date, day_number ) GROUP BY cohort_date ORDER BY cohort_date DESC LIMIT 14
